posts.text: It’s always a life changing moment when the Doctor enters the room and delivers awful news about cancer. But Susie is a warrior and that strength will help her get through this significant challenge. She will be in my prayers.

Don’t miss the show today with @Shawn_Farash. 🔥👇🏻

Another ridiculous snippet from Miranda Devine’s latest deranged attack on our reforms and personnel changes. 
Miranda’s Comey/Wray era FBI buddies are really upset they won’t be able to use counter intelligence programs to target Trump allies and administration officials so they run to Miranda, their mouthpiece, to whine and complain.
The only “culture of fear” that exists in this FBI is among Miranda’s deep state buddies who are afraid they’ll be exposed and/or investigated for abuses of power
Today is March 16th, 2026 and Donald J. Trump is the President of the United States of America.
